sourceMovie.title: Diablo
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Diablo (2025) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Diablo clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Diablo?
faq.answer: Try The International, The Killer, Coffy—each shares DNA with Diablo while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Diablo?
faq.answer: Diablo (2025) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Diablo worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
